name: thinqos
description: thinqOS Mind for Claude Code: reflexive memory priming, cross-machine resume, session capture into your Mind, and the thinqOS MCP tools. Requires the thinqos-harvest engine (uv tool install thinqos-harvest).

pat.title: thinqOS API key (tq_...)
